title: odontocline glabra
intro: Odontocline glabra, also known as toothache tree, is a plant species in the family Sapindaceae, native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds. The medicinal properties of Odontocline glabra include pain relief, reduced inflammation, and antimicrobial activity, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its health benefits include relief from toothaches, headaches, and fever, as well as support for digestive and respiratory health.
